message:
feat(usage): add TertiaryWindow and ModelWindows to UsageInfo

Extend rate limit tracking to support premium model-specific limits and
per-model breakdowns. Claude Max has overlapping limits:
- Primary: 5-hour rolling window (all models)
- Secondary: 7-day weekly cap (all models)
- Tertiary: Opus-specific daily/weekly limits (new)

Changes:
- Add TertiaryWindow field for premium model limits
- Add ModelWindows map for per-model rate limit windows
- Update AvailabilityScore with rebalanced weights (50/25/15/10)
- Update IsNearLimit to check tertiary and model windows
- Update TimeUntilReset to consider all window types
- Add MostConstrainedWindow() to find the limiting factor
- Add WindowForModel() to get model-specific limits

32 new tests covering all scenarios.

Closes: caam-zidd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
